_publications._publicationTitle: Selumetinib normalizes Ras/MAPK signaling in clinically relevant neurofibromatosis type 1 minipig tissues in vivo.

_contextSnippet: Ratio of p-ERK to total ERK, FOS and DUSP6 mRNA fold change in (A) skin, (B) sciatic nerve, (C) optic nerve, and (D) cerebral cortex
details: Used as normalization control for p-ERK measurements in tissue pharmacodynamic analysis across skin, sciatic nerve, optic nerve, and cerebral cortex
